## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between Monograph and GrowthX for content strategy and growth execution services.](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy sprint followed by growth execution, with pricing starting at \~$24,000 for initial commitment](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [GrowthX's platform combines AI workflows with human expertise to create comprehensive content strategies and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Robert (Monograph) expressed interest in moving forward, pending leadership team review next week](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [Additional services like web design and paid ads can be explored or facilitated through GrowthX's network](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Strategy Sprint and Service Overview

  - [8-week strategy sprint involving deep engagement with Marcel and team](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
  - [Customized workflows and artifact creation (e.g., company profiles, personas, content clusters)](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Internal platform combines AI-driven processes with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Outputs include detailed content strategy, SEO-focused content, and various digital assets](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Pricing starts at \~$12,000/month, with an initial 2-month commitment](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)

### GrowthX's Scalability and Process

  - [Multiple high-level strategists (Marcel, Kyle, Jason) lead sprints](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Only two kickoffs per week (Mondays) to manage workload](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Next available slots in mid-July, with high demand and potential waitlist](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Pre-work and research conducted before official kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

### Additional Services and Partnerships

  - [Web design capabilities demonstrated (e.g., Bappy, library.ai projects)](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [Paid ads services available through partner agency (Understory)](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Potential for content repurposing across various ad platforms](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Recommendation to hold off on internal ops experiments with other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

### Monograph's Specific Needs and Concerns

  - [Website repositioning and redesign (on Webflow) - can be explored during sprint](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Interest in paid ads integration with content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [Consideration of internal team involvement in strategy sessions](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send contract to Robert for review](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [Robert to discuss with leadership team during H2 planning next week](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [Potential signing and kickoff in late July](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Marcel to introduce Robert to Understory for paid ads discussion](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Schedule in-person meeting in East Bay for deeper dive after initial kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/PLNByxihssdi_z39xt4wm3WYzS2miBXy?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
